description: A compact TypeScript command-line project with Bun, Biome, type checking, Bun tests, agent notes, and a deterministic verification path.

generatedDocs.summary: This is a compact TypeScript Bun command-line project with tests, type checking, agent notes, generated operations docs, and a deterministic verification path.
generatedDocs.runtime: Bun owns package installation, runtime execution, and tests. Biome owns formatting and linting, TypeScript owns static checking, and `scripts/check` ties the full agent verification path together.
generatedDocs.firstUsefulEdit: Extend `src/cli.ts`, update `tests/cli.test.ts` first or in the same change, then rerun `./scripts/check`.
